issues.description: Text states '[Opponent's Turn]' which requires duration 'DuringOpponentTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. This is a major violation of duration rules.
Trigger should be 'StartOfTurn' (opponent's turn) or similar temporal trigger, not generic 'Trigger'. The effect activates during opponent's turn, not on a card play/attack event.
Target condition should verify Leader has {Navy} type. Current target lacks type condition check.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Opponent's Turn] Your {Navy} type Leader's base power becomes 7000.
